title: xanthophyllum pauciflorum
intro: Xanthophyllum pauciflorum, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, is a medicinal plant native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum pauciflorum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-diabetic and anti-cancer properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, and its extracts are also used in traditional folk medicine in Southeast Asia.
